subcodes.first_line: The letters of that honored one, each attained unto the presence of the Wronged One, and from every letter thereof wafted the fragrance of devotion, sincerity and steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامهای آنجناب هر یک بلحاظ مظلوم فائز و عرف توجه و خلوص و استقامت از هر حرفی
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @wisdom [hikmat], @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world
